# <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/The-FireHub-Project/the-firehub-project.github.io/master/resources/graphics/icons/firehub.svg" width="20" alt="FireHub Icon"> FireHub Pull Request

## 📌 Choose PR Type
Before proceeding, select the appropriate PR type for this change:

- 🐞 Bug Fix → Bug fix or defect resolution → [Bugs.md](?template=Bugs.md)
- 💢 Feature / Enhancement → New functionality or improvement → [Features_Enhancements.md](?template=Features_Enhancements.md)
- 🧰 Maintenance / Chore → Cleanup, upgrades, refactoring → [Maintenance_Chores.md](?template=Maintenance_Chores.md)
- 💥 Research / Experiment → Spike, prototype, investigation → [Research_Experimental.md](?template=Research_Experimental.md)
- ❓ Support / Incident → Production issue or support case → [Support_Incidents.md](?template=Support_Incidents.md)
- 📑 Documentation → Docs or guidance updates → [Documentation_Guidance.md](?template=Documentation_Guidance.md)
- ⚡ Optimization / Performance → Performance improvements → [Optimization_Performance.md](?template=Optimization_Performance.md)
- 🏛️ Governance / Compliance → Rules, policies, standards → [Governance_Compliance.md](?template=Governance_Compliance.md)
- 🪛 Generic / Task → General work not fitting other categories → [Generic_Tasks.md](?template=Generic_Tasks.md)
- 🔖 Release → Release preparation → [Release.md](?template=Release.md)
- 🔐 Security / Vulnerability → Security fixes or improvements → [Security_Vulnerability.md](?template=Security_Vulnerability.md)

## 📌 How to Use PR Templates

FireHub uses **specialized PR templates per type**.

To use the correct template:

### Option 1 — GitHub UI (Recommended)
When creating a PR:
1. Click **"Choose a template"** (if prompted)
2. Select the appropriate PR type from the list above

### Option 2 — Manual Selection
Use this URL pattern in GitHub:
